texto: Every class has pupils who mimic the teachers particularly well and perform for their classmates
autor: a class without such teacher-mimics would have something lifeless about it.
explicacao: Citação de a class without such teacher-mimics would have something lifeless about it. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Every class has pupils who mimic the teachers particularly well and perform for their classmates” articula reflexao, elias-canetti, every em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
